code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{useApp}from'../context/AppContext';import{useToast}from'../context/ToastContext';import Input from'../components/common/Input';import Button from'../components/common/Button';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function LoginPage(){const{admin,setAdmin,validateAdmin}=useApp();const{toast}=useToast();const navigate=useNavigate();const[creds,setCreds]=useState({username:'',password:''});const[error,setError]=useState('');const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);if(admin){navigate('/admin',{replace:true});return null;}const handleLogin=async e=>{e.preventDefault();setError('');setLoading(true);await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,350));if(validateAdmin(creds.username,creds.password)){setAdmin(true);toast('लॉगिन सफल! स्वागत है। 🙏','success');navigate('/admin',{replace:true});}else{setError('गलत यूज़रनेम या पासवर्ड। कृपया पुनः प्रयास करें।');setLoading(false);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"login-page",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"login-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"login-card__header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"login-card__icon",children:"\uD83D\uDD10"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"login-card__title",children:"Admin Login"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"login-card__sub",children:"\u092C\u091C\u0930\u0902\u0917 \u0926\u0932 \u090F\u0915\u0938\u0930 \u2014 Admin Panel"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleLogin,noValidate:true,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Input,{label:"Username",placeholder:"admin",value:creds.username,onChange:e=>setCreds({...creds,username:e.target.value}),autoFocus:true,autoComplete:"username"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Input,{label:"Password",type:"password",placeholder:"\u2022\u2022\u2022\u2022\u2022\u2022\u2022\u2022",value:creds.password,onChange:e=>setCreds({...creds,password:e.target.value}),autoComplete:"current-password"}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"login-card__error",children:error}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Button,{type:"submit",fullWidth:true,size:"lg",loading:loading,children:loading?'जाँच हो रही है...':'Login →'})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"login-card__hint",children:["Default: ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("code",{children:"admin"})," / ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("code",{children:"bajrang2024"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),"Password can be changed from Admin \u2192 Settings panel."]})]})});}
